paragraphs.text: COMMITTED MURDER AND FALSELY ACCUSED A YOUTH OF THE SAME CRIME 73. THE LIFE OF JOHN THE SOLDIER OF ALEXANDRIA

Abba Palladios told us that an old fellow living in the world was arrested for murder. When he was tortured by the magistrate of Abba Palladios told us this too: There was a soldier at Alexandria Alexandria he said that somebody else had been involved in the whose name was John. This was the kind of life he kd: all day long, murder as his accomplice, a youag fellow about twenty years old. from dawn to the ninth hour, he would stay in his monastery near They were both severely tortured. The old fellow said: ‘You were the steps of Saint Peter's <church> wearing nothing but a coarse

xr 56 The Spiritual Meadow John Moschos 57 cloak and weaving baskets. He kept his peace and would say Mother of God”. One day as the mother was occupying herself with nothing to anybody, He used to stay in the oratory doing his her tasks and the child was with her, the devil put it into the mind handwork and this was all he would say with his mouth: ‘Cleanse of the servant to murder the woman and her child, to scize all their me, Oh Lord, from my secret sins <Ps 18:13> that I be not disap- possessions and to run away. He took a knife from the kitchen and pointed in my prayer’. When he had recited this verse he would went to the dining-room where the mistress was. But when he remain silent for a good hour, then he would repeat the same thing reached the dining-room door he was afflicted with blindness so that an hour or more later. He said it seven times & day and never said he was unable either to return to the kitchen or Lo go on into the any other word at all. At the ninth hour he would remove the rough dining-room. He spent over an hour flailing the air and making cloak he was wearing and put on military uniform (in other words, evry effort to get in. Then he began to call for his mistress, saying: his own clothes) and go on duty with his own unit. I stayed with ‘Come here’, She was surprised Lhat the servant was standing in the this man for eight years and I was greatly edified by his silence and doorway and did not come to her, but rather called <for her to the way he lived his life. come to him>.
